chunks.text: Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2022 - EECS at Berkeley Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2022 Convergence You are warmly invited back to campus to attend the Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2022. BEARS i

CS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2022. BEARS is an opportunity for everyone in the wider UC Berkeley Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences community to come together to hear about some of our latest research and celebrate the year’s Distin

ur latest research and celebrate the year’s Distinguished Alumni. The 2022 lectures will highlight some of the discoveries and developments at the convergence of humans and computers in the virtual and physical worlds. Expanding Opportunities at Moff
